ValidationRule.description: Requires CPL Scholar leads to have complete and validated intake details before moving out of New.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $RecordType.Name = "CPL Scholar Lead", ISCHANGED(Status), TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Status)) = "New", OR( ISBLANK(Email), ISBLANK(School__c), ISPICKVAL(College_Year__c, "") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Before moving this lead out of New, confirm the email, matched school, and college year are present and valid.
